creator: freebsd@mhka.no
text:
Created attachment 199374
rename of modsecurity3 (patch-compatible)

See also bug #227917

This patch will rename www/mod_security3 to security/modsecurity3 as it's not an Apache module. This was requested by Bernard Spil in bug #227917, comment 1. The patch also updates dependencies in the www/nginx* ports.
